name: Howuku
description: All-in-one website analytics with dynamic heatmaps, session replay, conversion/form funnels, feedback widgets and 100+ integrations.

seo.title: Howuku — Session Replay / UX Analytics
seo.meta_description: Howuku: All-in-one website analytics with dynamic heatmaps, session replay, conversion/form funnels, feedback widgets and 100+ integrations.

when_to_use: Dynamic heatmaps revealing real user interaction patterns
Session replay to diagnose form abandonment issues
Funnel analysis identifying conversion drop-off steps
Feedback widgets collecting in-page user insights

pros: Dynamic heatmaps track elements across responsive layouts
Form and funnel analytics built in, not add-ons
Pricing undercuts Hotjar at comparable session volume
cons: Brand recognition is low so buy-in can be hard
Session replay UI lacks advanced filtering
Mobile app analytics are limited vs dedicated tools
Support response times vary for non-paid plans
review.verdict: Capable Hotjar alternative with cheaper tiers and dynamic heatmaps, if you don't need a household brand.
review.best_for: SMBs wanting Hotjar-style insights without Hotjar pricing at scale.
review.not_for: Mobile-first products or teams that need enterprise SLAs.
